security.csp: default-src 'self'; media-src 'self' mediastream: blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prodo needs camera access to track your focus and gaze using computer vision.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Prodo does not use the microphone but macOS may request this alongside camera access.
